title: Opinion: Opinion | No Peace With 'Peacebroker'? Why Iran Just Bombed A Pak-Based Terror Camp
summary_full: Just last week, Iran carried out strikes on terror camps inside Pakistan, targeting Jaish-al-Adl, an organisation that has long been operating in the border regions.
